jokes.question: Why did the chicken cross the road?
jokes.answer: To get to the other side! 🐔

jokes.question: In cricket, when does the ball come?
What do you call a lazy kangaroo?
What did the ocean say to the beach?
Why is the moon so broke?
jokes.answer: It's down to its last quarter! 🌙

jokes.question: What do you call a bear with no teeth?
Why did the math book look so sad?
jokes.answer: Because it had too many problems! 📚

jokes.question: What do you call a smart dinosaur?

funny_facts: Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins! 🦥
